newsSince: At its June 18, 2026 Investor Day, BE Semiconductor raised its long-term revenue target to EUR 1.7-2.2B (from EUR 1.5-1.9B), tied to 2.5D AI/datacenter and photonics demand and new hybrid-bonding use cases in logic, memory and co-packaged optics. Q1 2026 orders more than doubled YoY to EUR 269.7M, with hybrid-bonding unit demand above prior peaks and adoption expanding to ~20 customers. Materially strengthens the advanced-packaging/CPO bottleneck thesis.

Besi orders double on hybrid-bonding demand
BESI raises long-term targets at 2026 Investor Day - Besi IR

verdicts.rankRationale: June 18 Investor Day raised long-term revenue (EUR 1.7-2.2B) and margin (45% floor) targets on 2.5D AI/photonics and hybrid bonding. Genuine fundamental upgrade strengthens the advanced-packaging node thesis; move up even though the angle is well-known at $29B cap.
verdicts.bull: Raised long-term targets confirm hybrid bonding is the bottleneck enabler for AI chiplets; 20+ customers, orders doubling.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis well-identified; upgrade firms the structural case but visibility is already high.
verdicts.bear: 99% YTD/$29B cap prices a lot of the ramp; advanced-packaging order cycles can be lumpy.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the AI-node bottleneck lens the Investor Day target raise (revenue to EUR 2.2B top end, margin floor to 45%) on HBM/2.5D/chiplet packaging materially strengthens the choke-point case. Top-tier OSAT/packaging enabler earns a move up from rank 7.
verdicts.bull: Hybrid bonding is a hard-to-substitute bottleneck for HBM and chiplet stacking; raised targets validate the ramp.
verdicts.neutral: Already a top-10 pick; upgrade reinforces rather than transforms the standing.
verdicts.bear: Megacap-adjacent visibility means upside may be largely in the price after a 99% YTD run.

verdicts.rankRationale: Most direct beneficiary of the news on the CPO lens: the Investor Day explicitly named co-packaged optics and photonic integration as a new hybrid-bonding use case driving the higher long-term targets. This is fresh, dated evidence firming the photonic-integration enabler thesis; move up.
verdicts.bull: Management explicitly ties raised targets to CPO/photonic-integration hybrid bonding, a direct choke-point for optical AI interconnect.
verdicts.neutral: CPO ramp is multi-year; BESI captures it via tool sales rather than optics itself.
verdicts.bear: CPO adoption timing uncertain; current valuation leaves little margin for slippage.
